_comment_accuracy: transcriptionModel: 'whisper-large-v3' is most accurate; 'whisper-large-v3-turbo' is faster but less accurate. language: BCP-47 code of what you speak ('en', 'es', …) — improves accuracy. transcriptionPrompt: words/names/jargon/spellings to bias toward, e.g. 'Versionstory, Kubernetes, Zakar'.
_comment_provider: Transcription backend: 'groq' (cloud, fast+cheap), 'openai' (cloud; set 'openaiApiKey'), or 'local' (on-device whisper.cpp — private, free, offline; needs the whisper-server running). Cleanup always uses Anthropic. Optional 'localEndpoint' overrides the default http://127.0.0.1:8080/inference.
_comment_cleanup: When true (and an Anthropic key is set), Claude tidies the transcript before it is typed. Set false to type the raw transcript.
_comment_hotkey: Default is the fn (Globe) key as push-to-talk: hold fn and speak, release to transcribe. Set hotKeyKey to 'fn' for that. To use a held-modifier combo instead (toggle: press once to start, again to stop), set both fields, e.g. modifiers + 'space':
